title: Remove Alex proxy layer — skill IS the orchestrator, no hooks
description: Remove the Alex subagent proxy pattern entirely. The /directive skill already contains all orchestration logic — Alex was just a middleman that couldn't function (background agent can't approve Bash for CLI spawns). Delete alex-cos.md, delete all hooks (enforce-completion, enforce-orchestrator-scope), replace with an explicit review verification pipeline step. Lightweight directives run inline; medium/heavy launch as top-level CC processes via CLI or Foreman.

tasks.title: Delete alex-cos.md and all enforcement hooks

No references to Alex, background agents, or ui-review-request.json
